node.statement: N1.6 (CONCLUSION, pure algebra). theta(2F-1) j = j theta(2Phi-1), which is the contract. DERIVATION: by def-spectral-idempotent / GT-sgn-prop-P, theta(2F-1) = (1/2)(I_A + sgn(S_F)) in A and theta(2Phi-1) = (1/2)(I_B + sgn(S_Phi)) in B (S_F=2F-I_A, S_Phi=2Phi-I_B). Then theta(2F-1) j = (1/2)(I_A + sgn(S_F)) j = (1/2)(I_A j + sgn(S_F) j) [bilinearity of composition / linearity, GT-hyp] = (1/2)(j I_B + j sgn(S_Phi)) [I_A j = j I_B from N1.1; sgn(S_F) j = j sgn(S_Phi) from node 1.5] = (1/2) j (I_B + sgn(S_Phi)) [LINEARITY of j, GT-hyp H3] = j ((1/2)(I_B + sgn(S_Phi))) = j theta(2Phi-1). Therefore theta(2F-1) j = j theta(2Phi-1). This is exactly the contract. Uses node 1.5, def-spectral-idempotent, GT-sgn-prop-P, GT-hyp.
